protocols.description: Same calendar day alignment (D0), operationalized as ICU admission to end-of-day (hours-to-midnight cutoff).
protocols.use_case: Canonical daily aligner comparison against charttime windows

protocols.description: Observation window from ICU admission (intime) covering hours [0h, 6h).
Observation window from ICU admission (intime) covering hours [0h, 12h).
Observation window from ICU admission (intime) covering hours [0h, 24h).
protocols.use_case: Primary benchmark window (used in the paper/poster)

protocols.description: Causal lookback window for aligning notes to detected pattern events: notes in [t-6h, t] relative to pattern hour t (no lookahead).
protocols.use_case: Pattern-text evidence extraction and optional LLM annotation (SUPPORTIVE/CONTRADICTORY/UNRELATED)
